## Problem Statement

<!-- What analytical question is currently unanswerable? What business decision is blocked? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What model, metric, or feature would solve it? -->

## Affected Layer(s)

- [ ] Staging
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Mart
- [ ] ML
- [ ] Power BI
- [ ] CI / Automation

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How do we know this is done? List specific, testable conditions. -->

- [ ] Model builds without errors
- [ ] Grain is enforced by a custom assertion
- [ ] All columns documented
- [ ] Power BI measure added and tested (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you reject them? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Relevant analyses, external references, or data sources. -->
